mapper.select:
SELECT ast.id, ast.task_name, ast.task_type, ast.task_dimension, ast.task_description, ast.scoring_standard, ast.reference_material, ast.deadline, ast.status, ast.created_by, ast.create_time, ast.update_time, ast.tag_id,
ti.name AS tag_name
FROM assessment_task ast LEFT JOIN tag_info ti on (ti.id = ast.tag_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ast.task_name like CONCAT("%",#{queryFrom.taskName},"%")
AND ti.name like CONCAT("%",#{queryFrom.tagName},"%")
AND ast.task_type = #{queryFrom.taskType}
ORDER BY ast.create_time DESC
